title: Risk Simulation Request
description: Message for requesting a risk simulation

clearingMemberIdentification.description: Provides details about the clearing member identification

participantIdentification.description: Provides details about the participant identification

accountIdentification.description: Provides details about the account identification

marginRunId.description: Run ID of the margin calculation instance.

portfolioPositions.description: Indicates if the full portfolio positions should be considered for the simulation

collateralPositions.description: Indicates if the full collateral positions should be considered for the simulation

userComentary.description: Free text field for user comments related to the simulation request

simulationPosition.description: Array of positions to be included in the simulation

items.description: Position details to be used in simulation

simulationCollateralPosition.description: Array of collateral positions to be included in the simulation

items.description: Collateral position details to be used in simulation

examples.userComentary: Result under base scenario; revise foreign exchange exposure
